drift.note: Population drift over score distributions and daily top-20 queue overlap.

analyst.note: Latest validated Gemini analyst smoke output rendered into the executive dashboard.

responses.case_overview: This case involves a credit card fraud queue for 2013-09-01, containing 144,786 transactions with an average fraud score of 0.27. The queue includes 281 positively labeled fraud events. The top-ranked events, all scoring 0.383, include one confirmed fraud transaction (creditcard_fraud-542) and several other transactions with zero amounts.
observed_signals: Queue contains 144,786 rows with an average fraud score of 0.2738.
Maximum fraud score in the queue is 0.3832.
recommended_actions: Investigate event 'creditcard_fraud-542' and other top-scoring zero-amount transactions for commonalities (e.g., card numbers, merchants, timestamps).
Retrieve full transaction details for the top 8 events, including associated card numbers, merchant IDs, and any available geo-location or device information.
Analyze the nature of the zero-amount transactions to determine if they are authorization attempts, system tests, or a specific fraud vector.
evidence_gaps: Missing details on payer/payee parties and accounts for all transactions.
Missing merchant category code (MCC), geo-location, device ID, IP prefix, and email domain for all transactions.
Lack of context for the 0.0 EUR transaction amounts (e.g., authorization attempts, refunds, data errors).

responses.case_overview: Queue ieee_cis|2017-12-04 from ieee_cis on 2017-12-04 contains 3241 events with average score 0.803 and peak score 0.877. Current signal mix indicates high investigation priority.
observed_signals: Average fraud score 0.803, max fraud score 0.877.
Observed positive fraud labels: 92; AML labels: 0.
recommended_actions: Review top-ranked events with full transaction lineage and linked accounts.
Prioritize parties with repeated high-risk signals for enhanced due diligence.
Run temporal and counterparty concentration checks for potential structuring patterns.
evidence_gaps: Beneficial ownership and customer KYC context are not included in the case packet.
External sanctions/adverse media enrichments are not present in this run.

insights: 13/13 quality checks passed with zero defects; BigQuery core and graph surfaces are synchronized with local state.
Scoring coverage is 74.7%. IEEE queue pressure leads with mean queue score 0.672.
Graph intelligence contains 134,702 clusters with suspicious-edge share at 71.1%.
